author: @Foxstrich

text:
Everything was made in FL Studio and was based in 100% of sampling. The guitars were just two pitch-shifted strums - a bassy one and a rocky one. Drums are made of high-quality drum samples, but don't sound natural, I think because they do not take into account the strength (volume) of a hit.

Everything is 100% pitch-shifted samples, much as in MIDI, just with higher quality samples.
author: @Moto200Alt

text: Also, a word of advice: whatever you do, take a break once in a while. Its crucial for effectiveness. You'll do more in the morning the following day than in the evening of the previous one.
author: @Moto200Alt

text: Sorry. I'm also not sure whether it's not exclusive for a narrow market... i'd check on google and perhaps on eBay, it's really cheap and doesn't allow for much, perhaps your S2 is better

author: @Moto200Alt

text: This song is considered to be written by Elvis Presley, the "King" of Rock'n'Roll. In fact, King Harkinian himself is meant to be the Hyrule equivalent of Elvis. His habit of saying "MAH BOI" originates from a song by Elvis Presley called "My Boy", in which he just sings the words "My Boy" for 24 hours without taking a break to eat or to breathe. You may search for "My Boy" by elvis Presley on YT. However, be warned - you might get addicted to saying "MAH BOI"...
